why.title: Why Hire AI Integration Specialists?
why.sub: Our freelancers bring deep technical expertise, hands-on implementation skills, and a focus on real business outcomes.
why.feature1Desc: Our specialists work with AI tools daily — from GPT integrations and automation platforms to custom AI agent workflows.
why.feature2Desc: Not just advice — our freelancers build, deploy, and integrate AI solutions directly into your business operations.
why.feature3Desc: Every project is scoped for real business impact — streamlined workflows, reduced manual work, and measurable results.

cta.title: Ready to Integrate AI Into Your Business?
cta.sub: Hire verified AI specialists to automate workflows, build intelligent systems, and drive real business results.
cta.footerText: Create a free business account · Post projects · Pay only after approval

about.heroSub: Namso is the AI freelance marketplace that connects businesses with verified integration specialists.
about.missionText: Namso exists to make AI implementation accessible for every business. We connect companies with verified AI specialists who can build automations, deploy intelligent systems, and integrate AI tools — turning complex technology into practical business solutions.
about.storyText1: Namso started with a clear observation: businesses of all sizes want to leverage AI but struggle to find reliable, specialized talent to implement it. Meanwhile, skilled AI professionals need a dedicated platform to connect with businesses that value their expertise.
about.storyText2: We built Namso to bridge that gap. Our marketplace makes it easy for businesses anywhere in the world to find verified AI specialists who can automate workflows, deploy chatbots, build intelligent systems, and much more — with transparent pricing and secure payments.
about.whoText: Namso is built for businesses that want to implement AI solutions without the overhead of traditional consulting firms or the uncertainty of general freelance platforms.

values.resultsDesc: Every project on Namso is focused on delivering measurable business outcomes — not just recommendations.
values.fairDesc: Clear pricing, secure payments, and a platform built on trust between businesses and specialists.
values.forwardDesc: We believe AI will reshape how businesses operate. Our platform connects the right expertise with real business needs.
values.communityDesc: We're building a network of skilled AI professionals and forward-thinking businesses driving innovation together.

about.learnMoreSub: See how Namso connects businesses with verified AI integration specialists.

howItWorks.heroSub: Hire verified AI specialists to implement solutions for your business — here's how.

1.title: Post Your Project
1.desc: Describe the AI integration you need — from chatbot deployment to workflow automation or data pipeline setup. Posting is free.

2.title: Get Matched With Specialists
2.desc: Assign your project directly to verified AI specialists who fit your needs.

3.title: Work Gets Done
3.desc: Your specialist implements the solution using industry-leading AI tools. Review deliverables and request revisions if needed.

4.title: Pay Securely
4.desc: Release payment only when you're satisfied. If a project isn't delivered as agreed, our team provides support and a fair resolution process.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
securePayments.sub: Pay with confidence through our secure checkout. Your payment is only released after you review and approve the completed work.

cards.escrowDesc: Funds are held securely until the project is delivered as agreed.
cards.approvalDesc: Review the deliverables, request revisions if needed, and approve only when satisfied.
cards.disputeDesc: If a project isn't delivered as agreed, our team provides support and a fair resolution process.

benefits.title: Why Businesses Choose Namso
benefits.item3: Fast turnaround — most projects in 1–5 days

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.sub: Browse services from verified AI specialists or create a business account to post projects.
cta.secureText: Secure checkout · Protected payments · Pay only after approval

contact.heroSub: Have a question, partnership idea, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.responseTimeTitle: We aim to respond within 24 hours

success.title: Message Sent!
success.desc: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours at the email you provided.

errors.failedSend: Failed to send message. Please try again.

faq.heroSub: Everything you need to know about Namso.

browseServices.title: Browse Services
browseServices.sub: Professional AI integration services delivered by verified specialists. Secure payments, transparent pricing.
browseServices.noServicesSub: Try adjusting your search or filters.
browseServices.secureNotice: All services include secure escrow payments. You only pay after you approve the work.

bookCall.heroTitle: Let's map out your next AI project.
bookCall.heroSub: Whether you need a high-level strategy or help identifying specific tasks, our experts are here to guide you.

strategy.title: Strategy Call
strategy.desc: Perfect if you want to explore how AI can transform your business at a macro level. We'll discuss use cases, ROI, and overarching architecture.

task.title: Task Identifier Call
task.desc: Best if you know you need help but aren't sure how to break it down. We'll help you scope specific, actionable tasks ready to go on the marketplace.

form.title: Book Your Session
form.goals: What are your main goals and challenges?

success.title: Request Received
success.desc: Thank you for booking a call. Our team will review your details and reach out within 24 hours to schedule a time that works for you.
